texto: At heart, American conservatives like myself are believers in the Constitution. We believe that the principles embodied in the Constitution are enduring, and that to whatever extent we deviate from them we put our liberties at risk. Our views are consistent because we believe in absolute truths and the essential soundness, even righteousness, of the Founder's vision of government.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sean Hannity: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “At heart, American conservatives like myself are believers in the Constitution. We believe that t…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, freedom, principled pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e principled.

texto: Obama's rhetorical overtures to democracy, it turned out, were just a decoy to conceal his unwavering determination to govern from the far left.

texto: My life has been a gift up to this point, and I've been blessed beyond my wildest imagination. And wherever this ride takes me is where I'm going.

texto: People don't dream all their lives of escaping the hellish countries they live in and pay their life savings to underworld types for the privilege of being locked up in a freezing, filthy, stinking container ship and hauled like cargo for weeks until they finally arrive in Moscow or Beijing or Baghdad or Kabul. People risk their lives to come here---to New York. The greatest city in the world, where dreams become reality.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sean Hannity: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes.
